title: Poetry
description: Poetry documents overview material for Poetry in the language domain. It is classified as an operation page for the environment class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights 설치, Virtualenv, 생성, 삭제, and Dependency, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include language, and python, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is language / python / poetry / overview, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
